subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out. We're open to exploring potential synergies between our teams.

Regarding a call, would any of the following slots work for you?
• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time suits you best, and I'll send over a calendar invite.

With respect to your request for internal contact information and direct phone lines, I'm not able to share internal directory details. For all inquiries, please refer to our public website or continue corresponding through this channel.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards
